sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36478" key="e)caggelte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαγγ-ελτέον</orth>, <sense id="n36478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must report,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τίτινι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
